description.s: Creates image items from various sources: data URLs, Blobs/Files, or filesystem paths (Tauri). Used by obsidian-import and the image editor.

fromDataUrl.name: fromDataUrl
fromDataUrl.description: Create an image item from a base64 data URL.

fromBlob.name: fromBlob
fromBlob.description: Create an image item from a Blob or File.

fromFile.name: fromFile
fromFile.description: Create an image item from a file path (Tauri only).
